violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took ice machine out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris: -food prep area (service line), -toaster/oven areas (service line), -lowboys (service line) -prep table (back kitchen), -coffee machine area (back kitchen), -walk-in cooler vent (back kitchen). New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution at the mixer was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm); staff diluted during inspection. The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution in the bucket at counter was at zero (0) parts per million (ppm); staff refilled bucket during inspection. According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
Crates of milk and cream were observed stored on the floor in the walk-n. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

Gaskets on the reach-in freezer and reach-in refrigerator located in the back-room area were not in good repair. PIC stated that gaskets are onsite and need to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024
The receptacle in the staff toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024

The floors (specifically behind equipment) throughout the establishment have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Per PIC, deep cleaning was placed on hold due to recent pest control treatment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
